race.comment: GOLD COAST BELLE (6) was a dominant maiden winner fresh at Seymour, good out to this trip at Sandown Hillside last time when well backed. She maps ideally and will take catching with the main danger coming out. M'LADY ROSE (7) resumes. She backed up a smart debut with a very commendable effort behind star filly Sheza Alibi in the G3 Vanity at start two, beaten five lengths. She can improve again this time around and looks well placed. COOLY (4) went to the paddock as a 1.75 length maiden winner at Caulfield Heath and can run well here fresh. AMPING LASS (5) comes through a handy race fresh and can improve, respecting.
